---
title: "Site Map"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = F)
library(dataRetrieval)
library(styler)
library(scales)
library(here)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(dygraphs)
library(cowplot)
library(zoo)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggforce)
library(ggrepel)
library(Gmisc)
#library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(sf)
library(sfheaders)
library(terra)
library(FedData)
library(tidyterra)
library(whitebox)
library(stars)
library(mapview) # needs to be dev version:    remotes::install_github("r-spatial/mapview")
library(ggspatial)
```

```{r}
sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  filter(siteId %in% c("SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01"))
```

```{r}
# Read and transform USA shapefile
usShape <- st_read(here("Data/USA_Shp/cb_2018_us_state_500k.shp")) |>
  filter(!STUSPS %in% c("AK", "AS", "VI", "HI", "GU", "MP", "PR")) |>
  st_transform("ESRI:102003")

# Extract Kansas
ksShape <- usShape |> filter(STUSPS == "KS")

# Read in site data
sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |>
  filter(siteId %in% c("SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01") & watershed != "KNG") |> 
  st_transform("ESRI:102003")

stics <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |>
  filter(watershed %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) 

streams <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Streams") |>
  filter(watershed != "KNG") 
watersheds <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Watersheds") |>
  filter(watershed != "KNG")

site_colors <- c("KNZ" = "#0072B2", "SHN" = "#E69F00", "YMR" = "#CC79A7")

ksStreams <- st_read(here("Data/kansas_streams/kansas_streams_order3_9_webmerc.shp")) %>% 
  st_transform("ESRI:102003")



library(tmap)

# Set tmap to plotting mode (not interactive)
tmap_mode("plot")

# Define custom colors
site_colors <- c("KNZ" = "#0072B2", "SHN" = "#E69F00", "YMR" = "#CC79A7")
ks <- tm_shape(ksShape) +
  tm_polygons(fill = "white", 
              col = "black", 
              lwd = 8) +
  tm_shape(ksStreams) + 
  tm_lines(col = "#6c84a8", 
           lwd = "STRAHLER",
           lwd.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = c(0.5, 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5)*1.5),  # Remove breaks argument
           lwd.legend = tm_legend(show = FALSE)) +  # Hide line width legend
  tm_shape(sites) +
  tm_symbols(fill = "watershed",                                          
             size = 2, shape = 21,
             fill.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = site_colors),      
             col = "black") +
  tm_labels("watershed",  
            size = 5,
            options = opt_tm_labels(
              point.label = TRUE,
              remove_overlap = FALSE,
              point.label.method = "GA"
            )) +
tm_layout(
  legend.show = FALSE,
  frame = FALSE,
  bg.color = NA,               
  outer.bg.color = NA          
)

# Save with transparent background
tmap_save(ks, here("Figs/SFS_25/KS_Map.png"), 
          height = 25.4, width = 25.4, units = "in",
          bg = "transparent")
```

```{r}

knzElev  <- terra::rast("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/KNZ_DEM.tif")
shnElev  <- terra::rast("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/SHN_DEM.tif")
ymrElev  <- terra::rast("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/YMR_DEM.tif")

# Create separate maps manually
library(gridExtra)
# Create separate maps for each watershed with elevation
create_watershed_map <- function(watershed_name, elev_raster, watershed_poly, streams_data, sites_data, stic_data) {
  
  # Crop and mask elevation to watershed boundary
  elev_cropped <- crop(elev_raster$original_dem, watershed_poly)
  elev_masked <- mask(elev_cropped, watershed_poly)
  
  # Filter data for this watershed
  watershed_streams <- streams_data[streams_data$watershed == watershed_name, ]
  watershed_sites <- sites_data[sites_data$watershed == watershed_name, ]
  watershed_stics <- stic_data[stic_data$watershed == watershed_name, ]
  watershed_colors <- site_colors[watershed_name]
  
  # Create map with valid palette but no legend
  tm_shape(elev_masked) +
    tm_raster(col_alpha = 0.8,
              col.scale = tm_scale_continuous(values = terrain.colors(10)),
              col.legend = tm_legend(show = FALSE)) +  # Hide elevation legend
  tm_shape(watershed_poly) +
    tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 2) +
  tm_shape(watershed_streams) +
    tm_lines(col = "#6c84a8", lwd = 4) +
  tm_shape(watershed_sites) +
    tm_symbols(col = watershed_colors, size = 3, shape = 21, border.col = "black",
               col.legend = tm_legend(show = FALSE)) +  # Hide symbols legend
    tm_shape(watershed_stics) +
    tm_symbols(col = "red", size = 1, shape = 21, border.col = "black",
               col.legend = tm_legend(show = FALSE)) +
  tm_title(watershed_name, size = 5) +
  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE
  )
}

# Create maps for each watershed
knz_poly <- watersheds[watersheds$watershed == "KNZ", ]
shn_poly <- watersheds[watersheds$watershed == "SHN", ]
ymr_poly <- watersheds[watersheds$watershed == "YMR", ]

map_knz <- create_watershed_map("KNZ", knzElev, knz_poly, streams, sites, stics)
map_shn <- create_watershed_map("SHN", shnElev, shn_poly, streams, sites, stics)
map_ymr <- create_watershed_map("YMR", ymrElev, ymr_poly, streams, sites, stics)

# Arrange maps vertically
ws <- tmap_arrange(map_knz, map_shn, map_ymr)

tmap_save(ws, here("Figs/SFS_25/WS_Map.png"), height = 12.7, width =  25.4, units = "in", bg = "transparent")
```

```{r}
# Create the inset map
insetMap <-  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = usShape, fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_sf(data = ksShape, fill = NA, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0, "pt"),
        axis.title=element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"))

# Main map with inset
siteMap <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = ksShape, fill="#ffffff", color="black", linewidth=0.25) +
  geom_sf(data = ksStreams, color = "#6c84a8")+
  geom_sf(data = allSites, aes(color = Site), size = 5, shape = 20) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("KMZ" = "#345023", "Kings Creek Gage" = "#596C0B", "YMR" = "#3A1F46", "Elk River Gage" = "#7F4B89")) +
  geom_label_repel(data = allSites, aes(label = Site, geometry = geometry),
                   stat = "sf_coordinates", size = 5, fill = "white") +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(style = "ticks", line_width = 1.5, text_face = "bold")+
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal(), pad_x = unit(-0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(0.5, "cm"))+
  theme_few()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        text = element_text(size = 20),       # Increase overall text size
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20), # Increase axis titles size
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20),  # Increase axis text size
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20)  # Increase facet labels size) 
        )
#siteMap
siteMap2 <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(siteMap) +
  draw_plot(insetMap, x = 0.15, y = 0.62, width = 0.3, height = 0.3)

ggsave("siteMap.png", siteMap2, here("Figs/"), device = "png",  width = 9, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = "retina")

```
